choices.text: Student → Sport → Recreational → Private (PPL, 40 hrs min) → Commercial (250 hrs, paid pilot) → ATP (1,500 hrs, airline). Plus ratings: instrument, multi-engine, type. CFI to teach + build hours.
3 takeoffs + landings in last 90 days (day). Night passengers: 3 T/L full-stop at night in 90 days. IFR: 6 approaches + holds + course-tracking in 6 months. Flight review every 24 months with CFI.

questions.explanation: 3 T/L in 90 days; flight review 24 months.
